## 🚀 &nbsp; Featured Projects

<div align="center">

<table>
<tr>
<td align="center" width="33%">

### 🎬 Movie Booking App
![React](https://img.shields.io/badge/React-20232A?style=flat-square&logo=react&logoColor=61DAFB)
![Django](https://img.shields.io/badge/Django-092E20?style=flat-square&logo=django&logoColor=white)
![Redux](https://img.shields.io/badge/Redux-593D88?style=flat-square&logo=redux&logoColor=white)

Full-stack movie ticket booking system with **JWT auth**, **role-based access** (Admin/Owner/User), dynamic **10×10 seat selection** with real-time booking status, and REST APIs via Axios.

</td>
<td align="center" width="33%">

### ⚡ EV Charger Finder
![React](https://img.shields.io/badge/React-20232A?style=flat-square&logo=react&logoColor=61DAFB)
![Django](https://img.shields.io/badge/Django-092E20?style=flat-square&logo=django&logoColor=white)
![PostgreSQL](https://img.shields.io/badge/PostgreSQL-316192?style=flat-square&logo=postgresql&logoColor=white)

EV charging station discovery platform with **station availability**, **role-based features** for owners & users, scalable RESTful backend architecture for future expansion.

</td>
<td align="center" width="33%">

### 💊 MediCare App
![React](https://img.shields.io/badge/React-20232A?style=flat-square&logo=react&logoColor=61DAFB)
![TypeScript](https://img.shields.io/badge/TypeScript-007ACC?style=flat-square&logo=typescript&logoColor=white)
![Supabase](https://img.shields.io/badge/Supabase-3ECF8E?style=flat-square&logo=supabase&logoColor=white)

Medication tracking system for **caretakers & patients** — secure auth via Supabase, structured data management, and clean frontend-backend interaction with daily intake tracking.

</td>
</tr>
</table>

</div>

## 🧠 &nbsp; DSA Journey

<div align="center">

<img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/Platform-LeetCode-FFA116?style=for-the-badge&logo=leetcode&logoColor=black"/>
&nbsp;
<img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/Language-Python-3776AB?style=for-the-badge&logo=python&logoColor=white"/>
&nbsp;
<img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/Practice-Daily%20Grinding-00e5ff?style=for-the-badge&logo=target&logoColor=black"/>

<br/><br/>

[![LeetCode Stats](https://leetcard.jacoblin.cool/kumarsiva200426?theme=dark&font=Fira+Code&ext=heatmap&border=0&radius=16)](https://leetcode.com/kumarsiva200426)

<br/>

</div>

<div align="center">

| 🏷️ Topic | 📊 Status | 💡 Details |
|---|---|---|
| 📦 Arrays & Strings | ✅ **Mastered** | Sliding window, two pointers, prefix sum |
| 🔗 Linked Lists | ✅ **Mastered** | Reversal, merge, cycle detection |
| 📚 Stack & Queue | ✅ **Mastered** | Monotonic stack, deque patterns |
| 🔁 Recursion | ✅ **Mastered** | Base cases, call stack tracing |
| 🔍 Searching & Sorting | ✅ **Mastered** | Binary search variants, merge/quick sort |
| 🌳 Trees (Basics) | 🔥 **In Progress** | BFS, DFS, traversal orders |
| 🗺️ Graphs | 🎯 **Up Next** | BFS/DFS, shortest path |

</div>
